name: jack-workflow
description: Jacksen's personal Claude Code workflow marketplace.

plugins.name: harness-kit
plugins.description: Docs-driven closed-loop dev workflow: a global /harness command (deterministic loop entry) + a db-guard delete-safety hook, plus a project bootstrapper (stamps a local harness-engineering orchestrator with five-doc spec gate, LESSONS.md learning loop and enforcement hooks, + domain skills into each repo) + scaffold / coding-standards / git-commit / grill-me skills.
